nodes.label: Breath
nodes.description: You have learned to master your breath.
nodes.effect: Bonus Action: you can recover 1d4 stamina.

Neutral.description: You have learned to master your breath.
Neutral.effect: Bonus Action: you can recover 1d4 stamina.

nodes.label: 8-Arms
nodes.description: Focus your ki to strike with all your limbs.
nodes.effect: Cost: 2 stamina; Effect: make 2 unarmed attacks at disadvantage.

Neutral.description: Focus your ki to strike with all your limbs.
Neutral.effect: Cost: 2 stamina; Effect: make 2 unarmed attacks at disadvantage.

nodes.label: Sweep
nodes.description: Use your leg to trip nearby opponents.
nodes.effect: Cost: 3 stamina; Effect: make a sweeping attack that targets all creatures within 2 meters. Each target must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or take half of an unarmed attack damage.

Neutral.description: Use your leg to trip nearby opponents.
Neutral.effect: Cost: 3 stamina; Effect: make a sweeping attack that targets all creatures within 2 meters. Each target must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or take half of an unarmed attack damage.

nodes.label: Barrage
nodes.description: Unleash a flurry of strikes on your target.
nodes.effect: Cost: 2 stamina per attack; Effect: Unleashe (n) unarmed strikes with disadvantage against a target each dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage.

Neutral.description: Unleash a flurry of strikes on your target.
Neutral.effect: Cost: 2 stamina per attack; Effect: Unleashe (n) unarmed strikes with disadvantage against a target each dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage.

nodes.label: Pressure Points
nodes.description: Strike your opponent's vital points to stun them.
nodes.effect: Cost: 0 stamina; Effect: Instead of dealing damage, you can apply a Stun Counter to the target with a successful attack.

Neutral.description: Strike your opponent's vital points to stun them.
Neutral.effect: Cost: 0 stamina; Effect: Instead of dealing damage, you can apply a Stun Counter to the target with a successful attack.

nodes.label: Burst
nodes.description: Release a burst of energy to strike multiple foes around you.
nodes.effect: Cost: 3 stamina; Effect: Force every creature within 3 meters to make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half damage. This is considered an unarmed attack. After this action, you cannot make any other attacks during the turn.

Neutral.description: Release a burst of energy to strike multiple foes around you.
Neutral.effect: Cost: 3 stamina; Effect: Force every creature within 3 meters to make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half damage. This is considered an unarmed attack. After this action, you cannot make any other attacks during the turn.

nodes.label: Strike
nodes.description: Use your martial Arts skills to strike your opponents.
nodes.effect:
Cost: 0 stamina; Effect: When attacking with an unarmed strike instead of dealing damage, you can apply one of these Effects to your opponent.
- Grab: grapple the target (if they are the same size as you or smaller)
- Push: push them back 10ft
- Swap: swap places with the creature
- Steal: you take an item on their person that they are not wielding or wearing
- Trip: knock them prone
You can spend 2 Stamina to apply two of these effects on the same attack.

Neutral.description: Use your martial Arts skills to strike your opponents.
Neutral.effect:
Cost: 0 stamina; Effect: When attacking with an unarmed strike instead of dealing damage, you can apply one of these Effects to your opponent.
- Grab: grapple the target (if they are the same size as you or smaller)
- Push: push them back 10ft
- Swap: swap places with the creature
- Steal: you take an item on their person that they are not wielding or wearing
- Trip: knock them prone
You can spend 2 Stamina to apply two of these effects on the same attack.

Neutral.description: If you hit with unarmed attacks 3 or more times in a turn
